description: Source repositories to be consolidated into XPS_INTELLIGENCE_PLATFORM. Each entry may have a 'pin_sha' to lock analysis to a specific commit. Leave 'pin_sha' as null to always analyse the latest default-branch HEAD.

repos.note: Phase 1 — primary backend / agent source repo
Phase 1 — primary frontend (Next.js / React) source repo
Phase 2 — build pipeline and Quantum-X integration source repo
Phase 3 — admin control plane source repo
Phase 4 — ConstructIQ-360 and full agent suite source repo
